_comment: Tests Node 9 wrap-up routing: follow-up request handling, CLEAR DECLINE end_call contract, plain-affirmative gate, and correct routing table intent selection.

scenarios.name: CLEAR DECLINE — farewell must call end_call in same turn as goodbye

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
No, that's all. Thanks so much!

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent speaks a brief goodbye AND calls end_call in the same response turn. FAIL if: agent says goodbye without calling end_call, or calls end_call without any spoken farewell, or produces a second farewell on a subsequent turn.

scenarios.name: PLAIN AFFIRMATIVE — 'yes' alone must not trigger routing

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Yes.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent asks exactly 'What can I help you with?' with no tool call this turn. FAIL if: agent calls universal_router with any intent, or ends the call, or asks 'Can I help with anything else?' again.

scenarios.name: Practitioner availability at wrap-up — wrap_new_known not info_pivot

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Has Maia got any more appointments available on Monday?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_new_known' with payload practitioner_preference='Maia' and timeframe_raw='Monday', zero spoken output. FAIL if: intent='info_pivot' is used, agent speaks before routing, or intent='wrap_new_unknown' when appointment_type_id is set.

scenarios.name: Follow-up booking request — routes to wrap_new_unknown not wrap_up

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Actually, can I book a remedial massage as well?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_new_unknown' with zero spoken output. FAIL if: intent='wrap_new_known' is used (different service from appointment_type), or agent says 'Sure!' and then ends the call, or asks a clarification question before routing.

scenarios.name: Reschedule of appointment just made — wrap_reschedule not cancel_intent

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Yeah, actually I need to move that appointment I just made to next week.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_reschedule' with zero spoken output. FAIL if: intent='cancel_intent' is used, or intent='wrap_modify' is used instead of wrap_reschedule, or agent speaks words before routing.

scenarios.name: Vague booking request — route immediately, never ask clarifying questions

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Can you give me an appointment slot?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router with intent='wrap_new_known' (appointment_type_id is set) or intent='wrap_new_unknown' (appointment_type_id is 'none'), zero spoken output. FAIL if: agent asks 'Are you looking for X again, or something different?' or any other clarifying question, or handles availability/booking itself.

scenarios.name: Sure + farewell compound — 'Sure, thanks' must be treated as CLEAR DECLINE

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Sure, thanks — that's all.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent treats this as CLEAR DECLINE (farewell word 'thanks' present), speaks a brief goodbye, AND calls end_call in the same turn. FAIL if: agent interprets 'Sure' as a PLAIN AFFIRMATIVE and asks 'What can I help you with?' — the farewell word 'thanks' overrides the plain affirmative.

scenarios.name: Bare 'change that appointment' with no service named — defaults to wrap_reschedule

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Yeah, I need to change that appointment, please.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_reschedule' with zero spoken output. FAIL if: intent='wrap_modify' is used — the caller has not named a different service or appointment type, only 'change that appointment', so this must default to wrap_reschedule.

scenarios.name: True wrap_modify — caller explicitly names a different service

history.content: Can I help with anything else?
Actually can you change that to a remedial massage instead of the consult?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_modify' with zero spoken output. FAIL if: intent='wrap_reschedule' or 'wrap_new_unknown' is used instead — the caller explicitly named a different service ('remedial massage instead of the consult'), which is the wrap_modify case.

scenarios.name: POST-CANCEL reschedule offer — bare 'Perfect' must route to wrap_reschedule, not end the call

history.content: I've cancelled your appointment. Can I reschedule that for you now?
Perfect.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_reschedule' with zero spoken output, no end_call. FAIL if: agent treats 'Perfect' as CLEAR DECLINE and speaks a goodbye + calls end_call — this was the exact regression this scenario was added to catch.

scenarios.name: POST-CANCEL reschedule offer — 'That works' must route to wrap_reschedule

history.content: I've cancelled your appointment. Can I reschedule that for you now?
That works, yeah.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_reschedule' with zero spoken output. FAIL if: agent asks a clarifying question, ends the call, or fails to call universal_router.

scenarios.name: Name correction at wrap-up — calls leave_message with correction note, no wrap_up loop

history.content: Perfect Jayda! I've cancelled your July 27 appointment and booked your return massage with Georgia for Monday August 3rd at 5 PM. Can I help with anything else?
No, it was for Celine, not Jayda.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent apologizes briefly ('Apologies about that' or similar), speaks one filler phrase, calls universal_router intent='leave_message' with a payload that includes a message_body referencing the name correction (Celine / Jayda or 'wrong name' / 'correct patient'), speaks the tool result, then asks CLOSING_QUESTION. FAIL if: agent says 'Got it, I'll make sure that's updated to Celine' or any other promise to directly update the booking without calling a tool; FAIL if agent calls universal_router intent='wrap_up' after leave_message (would loop); FAIL if agent calls end_call before asking CLOSING_QUESTION.
